title: SQL: select ... where extract( ...) = ... and extract( ...
poc:
select c from t where extract( hour from c ) = 12 and 
 extract( minute from c ) = 34;
key_bug_features: extract function with multiple conditions on time column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIME, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, TIME '12:34:56', 'Event A');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, TIME '12:34:00', 'Event B');
SELECT event_time FROM test_table WHERE EXTRACT(HOUR FROM event_time) = 12 AND EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM event_time) = 34;
SELECT event_time FROM test_table WHERE EXTRACT(HOUR FROM event_time) IS NULL OR EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM event_time) IS NULL;
